title: Weighted Evaluation Score
description: Combine multiple evaluation metric scores into a single weighted score for model comparison.
problem: Write weighted_score(scores, weights) where both are dicts with the same keys (metric name -> value). Return the weighted average: sum(scores[k]*weights[k]) / sum(weights.values()), rounded to 3 decimals.
hint: numerator = sum(scores[k] * weights[k] for k in scores); denominator = sum(weights.values()); return round(numerator/denominator, 3)
